allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\xampp\\htdocs\\Claude\\Kabaddiadda\\apps\\web"; if \(Test-Path .next\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; Remove-Item dev.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cleaned. .next exists? $\(Test-Path .next\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 24520 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { foreach \($c in $conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; $conn2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn2\) { Write-Output "Port 3000 still in use by PID $\($conn2[0].OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 is now free" }; Set-Location "c:\\xampp\\htdocs\\Claude\\Kabaddiadda\\apps\\web"; if \(Test-Path .next\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }; Remove-Item dev.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ".next cleared")

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $cssUrls = [regex]::Matches\($html, '/_next/static/chunks/[^"\\s]+\\.css'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($u in $cssUrls\) { $body = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $cards = [regex]::Matches\($body, '--card:[^;]+;'\); $secs = [regex]::Matches\($body, '--secondary:[^;]+;'\); foreach \($m in $cards\) { Write-Output "Card: $\($m.Value\)" }; foreach \($m in $secs\) { Write-Output "Secondary: $\($m.Value\)" } })

PowerShell($routes = @\('/', '/tournaments', '/live', '/login'\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("{0,-15} {1}" -f $r, $resp.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("{0,-15} {1}" -f $r, $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output \("STATUS: " + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
